name: The Legend of Zelda
description: Nintendo's adventure franchise about Link, Zelda, Hyrule, exploration, dungeons, and mythic cycles.

eras.title: Classic 2D Era
eras.description: Original top-down adventures and the foundation of Zelda's exploration-dungeon structure.

eras.title: 3D Template Era
eras.description: Ocarina of Time and its successors define 3D Zelda structure.

eras.title: Experimentation Era
eras.description: Handheld, motion-control, and structural experiments before the open-air reset.

eras.title: Open-Air Era
eras.description: Breath of the Wild and Tears of the Kingdom reshape Zelda around open-ended systemic exploration.
